_readme: Measured or assumed game constants the simulator depends on. Every entry carries verified:true only after an in-game practice-mode measurement (record date + method in source). The harness lists unverified fixtures on every run and refuses to stamp any artifact 'Proven' while a constant it used is unverified. See docs/v5-engine-design.md, component A.

mitigation.source: Assumed standard K=100 (damage*100/(100+armor)); shipped default stays 100. DATA WARNING 2026-06-12: implied K from total_damage_mitigated rises 122->150 with armor (n=23k players), meaning the field includes shields/DR and the formula cannot be verified from aggregates; if true K > 100, current EHP outputs OVERVALUE armor. range [100,150] is swept by the robustness check (src/robustness.ts) to flag picks that depend on the unknown. Measure in practice mode (highest-priority measurement).

percentPenMultiplicative.source: Patch 1.14 notes: percent armor penetration now multiplicative (predecessorgame.com, May 19 2026).

abilityHaste.source: Assumed LoL-style ability haste. Measure: Timewarp + known-CD ability, stopwatch.

critMultiplier.source: Assumed 1.75. DATA EVIDENCE 2026-06-12: largest_critical_strike envelope over 6,657 crit builders, densest ratio bins 1.6-1.8 under bonus-only scaling (consistent with 1.75; confounded by crit-damage modifiers and possible post-mitigation recording). range [1.6,1.8] is swept by the robustness check. Confirm in practice mode.

attackSpeedFormula.source: Assumed. base_stats.attack_speed is per-level attacks/sec (omeda.city heroes.json); item attack_speed treated as percent.

abilityScalingUsesBonusPowerOnly.source: base_stats.physical_power equals the basic-attack per-level damage line. DATA EVIDENCE 2026-06-12: the crit envelope is only plausible under bonus-only scaling (mode 1.6-1.8); total-power reading implies an absurd 1.2x crit multiplier. Confirm in practice mode.

ultRankLevels.source: VERIFIED 2026-06-12 from pred.gg recommendedSkills (in-game data): 18-entry skill orders place ULTIMATE at positions 6/11/16 for gideon, greystone, sparrow.

maxLevel.source: 18-entry base stat arrays across all heroes (omeda.city heroes.json, patch 1.14.4).

attackSpeedCap.crossCheck: Maintainer web research (2026-06-14) cites a 350-420% attack-speed cap. That is a percent-bonus figure, whereas the shipped 3.0 is an absolute attacks/sec ceiling from the Cursed Ring tooltip; the two are likely the same limit seen two ways (base AS x cap ~= 3/sec for most heroes). Shipped value left at 3.0 (stronger in-game source); confirm the units in practice mode before reconciling.
attackSpeedCap.source: STATED in item data: Cursed Ring (Broken Chains) reads "Increase the Attacks per Second Cap from 3 to 4", so the default cap is 3.0 attacks/sec (4.0 with that effect, currently unmodeled). Applied 2026-06-14 from the stated value; the formula interaction still merits a practice-mode check (checklist 7), so it stays verified:false (output remains THEORY).

checkpoints._note: Minute -> typical level and item gold by role. GOLD is MEASURED: per-role medians from the match feed, re-derived on data refresh, data/aggregates/2026-07-06.json. Caveat: gold_earned_at_interval includes ~2-3 pregame entries, so values may lag true game-minute by up to ~2-3 minutes. LEVELS remain PROVISIONAL: the feed has no level timeline (autonomy policy rule: flagged, not estimated).

referenceProfiles._note: Enemy defense profiles for damage objectives, level-13 ballpark: squishy = mage/carry base armor + no defense items; bruiser = fighter base + one defensive item; tank = warden base + two defensive items + HP. Derived from omeda.city base_stats at level 13.

neutralObjectives._note: Neutral jungle-objective profiles for solo-clear feasibility (can a jungler take it alone, and at what level/items). UNVERIFIED placeholders pending practice-mode measurement of HP, armor, and contact damage per second; output stays THEORY. Add real values + verified:true after measuring.
